title: asperula cynanchica subsp. neglecta
intro: Asperula cynanchica subsp. neglecta, also known as woodruff, is a perennial plant in the family Rubiaceae. It has been used for centuries for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as an antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant. The health benefits of asperula cynanchica subsp. neglecta include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and lowering blood pressure. Herbal preparations of woodruff typically involve infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, or topical creams for various health applications.
